name: @stellar-identity/circuits
description: Circom circuits for Stellar Identity zero-knowledge proofs

scripts.build: circom range_proof.circom --r1cs --wasm --sym && circom set_membership.circom --r1cs --wasm --sym && circom credential_ownership.circom --r1cs --wasm --sym && circom composite_proof.circom --r1cs --wasm --sym
scripts.setup: snarkjs powersoftau new bn128 12 pot12_0000.ptau -v && snarkjs powersoftau contribute pot12_0000.ptau --name="First contribution" -v && snarkjs powersoftau prepare phase2 pot12_0000.ptau pot12_final.ptau -v
scripts.generate-keys: snarkjs groth16 setup range_proof.r1cs pot12_final.ptau range_proof_0000.zkey && snarkjs zkey contribute range_proof_0000.zkey --name="1st Contributor Name" -v && snarkjs zkey export verificationkey range_proof_0000.zkey range_proof.vkey
scripts.prove: snarkjs groth16 fullprove range_proof_input.json range_proof.wasm range_proof_0000.zkey range_proof_proof.json range_proof_public.json
scripts.verify: snarkjs groth16 verify range_proof.vkey range_proof_public.json range_proof_proof.json

author: Stellar Identity Team
